title: Russian Kinako Brioche Pull-Apart
description: Indulgent Russian treat featuring winey, cheese-pull goodness with kinako and keto-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine almond flour, coconut flour, granulated sugar, and matcha powder.
Add softened butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
Whisk together eggs and Greek yogurt in a separate bowl.
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Cover the dough and let rest for 10 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch (1 cm).
Cut out squares of dough, approximately 3 inches (7.5 cm) per side.
Place kinako powder in a shallow dish.
Dip each dough square into the kinako powder, coating both sides evenly.
In a separate dish, mix together mozzarella and cream cheese.
Place a spoonful of the cheese mixture onto one half of each kinako-coated dough square.
Fold the other half over the cheese to form a square shape, pressing edges to seal.
Place the squares into a greased pull-apart pan or a muffin tin.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Use a skewer or fork to create a hole in the center of each square, allowing cheese to melt and pull apart as it cools.
